title: Hastings
content:
Roof Restoration Hastings

Professional Roof Restoration & Gutter Repairs in Hastings. Sandhurst Roofing are proud to offer the people of Hastings, with high quality and expert roofing services. No job is too big or too small for our team of expert tradespeople –  every person on our team are registered roof tilers and roof plumbers.

We’re one of the leading roof repair and restoration, gutter repair and installation providers in Hastings, and across Melbourne. We’re also experienced working with many different products and materials like terracotta tiles, Colorbond roofing, flat metal roofing and cement tiles. You’re next roofing job is safe in Sandhurst Roofing’s capable hands.

Get a Quote!

Offering Honest & Reliable Roof Repairs in Hastings

We’re proud to provide high quality roof repairs and restorations to the people of Hastings.

Since Sandhurst Roofing opened over 30 years ago, we’ve become one of Melbourne’s leading roofing companies. Our team pride themselves on giving people honest advice, every step of the way to make sure they feel comfortable with the entire process.

For every job that we undertake, we use industry leading materials, that are durable and long-lasting. That’s why we offer you a 10-year guarantee on our quality workmanship and materials.

Are ready to experience the Sandhurst Roofing difference? It’s time to contact the locals at Sandhurst today.

Get a Quote!

Gutter Repairs Hastings

At Sandhurst Roofing we understand that maintenance, repair and replacement of your gutters is a crucial part of keeping your roof in good condition. Gutters direct water away from the roof, preventing mould growth, rotting, leaks and much more from ruining the look and structural stability of our roof.

Gutters are often said to be the most important part of your roof; that is why we use COLORBOND® steel, the most durable and reliable product available to us. COLORBOND® steel is not only incredibly durable, and built for all different types of weather conditions, but it is also extremely versatile and has a colour to suit any type of existing property. For more information on our comprehensive roofing and guttering service, call us today on 0448 812 800.

What Our Hastings Customers Say

Andy and his crew were a pleasure to deal with. They were responsive and reliable with any questions that I had and were happy to work with me whilst other trades were scheduled into the job. Very happy with the end result and I would definitely recommend them to others.

Call Today, For Help With Your Repairs and Restorations In Hastings

Whether you live in Hastings or surrounding areas like Balnarring Beach, Bittern, Crib Point, Merricks North, Moorooduc, Tuerong or Tyabb, our team of experts will be on hand to solve your roof issues.

If you’re ready to get your roofing project underway? Call Steve today on 0448 812 800 and we’ll provide you with a quote. Alternatively, you can email us at info@sandhurstroofing.com.au and one of our team will get back to you as soon as possible.
